primary_on_target_suite.fastest_path: git clone https://github.com/xx0220/CRISPR_HNN.git and copy datasets/*.csv

primary_off_target_suite.fastest_path: download https://ndownloader.figshare.com/files/49344577 into data/public_benchmarks/off_target/primary_cclmoff, then supplement with GEO/supplement extraction for CHANGE-seq and DNABERT-Epi tables
blocked_items: CCLMoff compiled bundle not yet mirrored locally
DIG-seq/DISCOVER-seq/DISCOVER-seq+ processed tables easiest via CCLMoff Figshare
DNABERT-Epi unified classifier tables still require supplement extraction
reconstructable_items: CHANGE-seq processed site tables from GEO raw + pipeline
GUIDE-seq and CIRCLE-seq positives from paper repos with generated negatives

secondary_off_target_faststart_suite.claim_note: Secondary convenience suite only; not a substitute for the modern primary external claim benchmark.

next_required_actions: Clone the CRISPR_HNN repo and stage the nine canonical on-target CSVs locally.
Clone the DeepHF and CRISPOR repos as authoritative/raw and extended mirrors.
Clone Tsai lab pipeline repos and dagrate convenience mirror for off-target preprocessing support.
Download or manually fetch the CCLMoff Figshare compiled bundle to complete the modern primary off-target suite.
Extract supplement-based tables for DNABERT-Epi and any assay datasets that are not already bundled in CCLMoff.
